workstreams.name: ABC Core Decompilation
workstreams.rationale: Largest logic surface resides in frame2 DoABC block.
successCriteria: Map function symbols for Chrysler namespaces

workstreams.name: Symbol Linking and Overrides
workstreams.rationale: Class and export maps drive runtime binding; duplicate character IDs need explicit handling.
successCriteria: Document override rules for duplicated character IDs

workstreams.name: UI Asset Reconstruction
workstreams.rationale: High volume of DefineBitsLossless2 assets and named UI exports indicate heavy skinning surface.
successCriteria: Create asset catalog with dimensions and usage hints
Map critical UI states for buslog/proxi/ecu flows

workstreams.name: Domain Feature Surface Mapping
workstreams.rationale: Keyword density points to diagnostic modules (buslog, proxi, ecu, flash).
successCriteria: Produce module list grouped by feature family

workstreams.name: Embedded Binary Payload Triage
workstreams.rationale: Nine DefineBinaryData blobs may contain shaders or auxiliary runtime payloads.
successCriteria: Fingerprint each blob type and purpose
Link binary blob character IDs to consuming classes
